name.description: Lowercase service name; must match the parent folder.

modules.description: Ordered Bicep modules to deploy in single-service mode (dependencies included).

allModeModules.description: Modules to deploy in `all` mode (typically just this service's own module — dependencies were already handled by an earlier item).

buildWorkspaces.description: npm workspaces (relative to repo root) to compile before docker buildx build. Each runs `npm run build -w <ws>`. Defaults to ['packages/sdk']. Worker uses just the SDK; portal uses ['packages/sdk','packages/portal'].

rollout.description: Present when this service produces a Kubernetes Deployment that the orchestrator should wait on.

pipeline.description: Override the default pipeline for this service. Defaults to deploy-manifest.defaults.pipelineByKind[kind].

path.description: Override path to the module's main.bicep (relative to repo root). Defaults to deploy/services/<Name>/bicep/main.bicep.
